query.text: I am a patient recently diagnosed with Breast Cancer, Stage II. I am looking for treatment experiences and doctor recommendations.

retrieved_experiences.raw_text: I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Chemotherapy. Recovery took 174 days. Side effects included hot_flashes,lymphedema. My care team at Cleveland Clinic was outstanding throughout the process.

I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Radiation. Recovery took 352 days. Side effects included hair_loss,nausea. My care team at Johns Hopkins Hospital was outstanding throughout the process.

I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Chemotherapy. Recovery took 393 days. Side effects included nausea,hot_flashes. My care team at Mayo Clinic was outstanding throughout the process.

I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Surgery. Recovery took 208 days. Side effects included fatigue,hot_flashes. My care team at Mayo Clinic was outstanding throughout the process.

I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage II) and underwent Surgery. Recovery took 104 days. Side effects included neuropathy,nausea. My care team at Johns Hopkins Hospital was outstanding throughout the process.
